svg.title: ContentRadar system architecture diagram
svg.desc: Data flow diagram showing how firm inputs pass through the backend scoring engine, external APIs, and Claude AI to produce scored JSON that the Svelte frontend renders as the audit tool.

g.text: Name · city · website · LinkedIn · Facebook · Instagram

svg.text: Backend — server-side only · API keys never exposed to browser

g.text: 5. Calculate totals · build scored JSON · return to frontend
Content gap % · referral score · group scores · Cohort 1 benchmarks · needs-review flags

svg.text: Svelte frontend — browser only · no API keys

g.text: Renders scored JSON · no API calls · tab switching · download
